Hi there! 👋 My name is Grace Sodipo, an honours freshman majoring in Computer Science at the University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff (UAPB). I'm passionate about the intersection of health and technology — exploring the new realities that tech can bring to the healthcare sector. I'm actively growing as a developer and always pushing myself to learn more.

* 🎓 **Academic**: University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff — B.Sc. Computer Science, Honours Program
* 🌐 **Leadership & Affiliations**: Carolyn F. Blakely Honors Program · STEM Academy · NSBE · ColorStack · Rewriting the Code
* 🧠 **Learning & Research**: Software Engineering · Bioinformatics · AI in Healthcare · Full-Stack Development
* 🛠️ **Core Stack**: Python · C++ · JavaScript · HTML · CSS · Node.js · React · Git & GitHub

&nbsp;
